events.title: Referral received
events.detail: New referral from Kaiser Permanente San Francisco for client 1137. Starting intake pipeline.

events.title: Client profile structured
events.detail: Diet orders: diabetic, renal. Allergies: egg, tree_nut. Sodium ceiling 550 mg/meal, carbs 45–60 g/meal. Prefers Vietnamese; dislikes lentils, beef. Cooking ability: stovetop. 7 meals/week, zone Excelsior.

events.title: Dispatching Clinical Matching Agent
events.detail: Hard constraint hierarchy locked: allergens → sodium → carbs → diet-order tags. Exclusion rules, never scoring penalties.

events.title: Scanning inventory
events.detail: Scoring all 80 meals against hard constraints, then ranking survivors by cuisine preference and dislike avoidance.

events.title: Rejected: Fresh Spring Rolls with Chicken
events.detail: Excluded — carbs: 41 g outside 45–60 g range.

events.title: Rejected: Tofu and Vegetable Curry with Rice
events.detail: Excluded — diet order 'renal': meal lacks 'renal-friendly' tag.

events.title: Matched: Overnight Oats with Berries
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 300/550 mg ✓, carbs 55 g (target 45–60) ✓, no egg/tree_nut ✓. Sourced from kitchen batch B7.

events.title: Matched: Winter Melon Soup with Chicken and Rice
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 354/550 mg ✓, carbs 45 g (target 45–60) ✓, no egg/tree_nut ✓. Sourced from kitchen batch B6.

events.title: Matched: Ginataang Gulay with Rice
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 401/550 mg ✓, carbs 51 g (target 45–60) ✓, no egg/tree_nut ✓. Sourced from kitchen batch B4.

events.title: Batch allocated: Overnight Oats with Berries
events.detail: Serving drawn from scheduled batch B7 (110 servings, 10 labor hours on 2026-07-20).

events.title: Batch allocated: Winter Melon Soup with Chicken and Rice
events.detail: Serving drawn from scheduled batch B6 (80 servings, 7 labor hours on 2026-07-22).

events.title: Batch allocated: Ginataang Gulay with Rice
events.detail: Serving drawn from scheduled batch B4 (30 servings, 3 labor hours on 2026-07-20).

events.title: Batch allocated: Chicken Congee with Scallions
events.detail: Serving drawn from scheduled batch B2 (120 servings, 10 labor hours on 2026-07-20).

events.title: Donation D002 feeds batch B2
events.detail: Fresh Bok Choy (cases), Carrots (25 lb bags) from Bay Area Produce Exchange — triaged as kitchen ingredient.

events.title: Route assigned
events.detail: Client 1137 added to route R-EXCE-2 (Excelsior), delivery 2026-07-21, window 10:00–12:00. Cold chain OK.

events.title: Plan complete
events.detail: Client 1137: 7 compliant meal(s) at fallback level 1. 0 hard-constraint violations.
